'Tactical' Advantage.name: 'Tactical' Advantage
'Tactical' Advantage.description: Knockout and Bushwhack now increases your damage dealt against the target by 10% for 5 seconds.

2 Bushcraft Gliders.name: 2 Bushcraft Gliders
2 Bushcraft Gliders.description:
Craft 2 |cffffffffGliders|r for an ally, causing them to glide while in the air and reducing their damage taken from falling for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Not usable while in combat.

3 Bushcraft Gliders.name: 3 Bushcraft Gliders
3 Bushcraft Gliders.description:
Craft 3 |cffffffffGliders|r for an ally, causing them to glide while in the air and reducing their damage taken from falling for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Not usable while in combat.

4 Bushcraft Gliders.name: 4 Bushcraft Gliders
4 Bushcraft Gliders.description:
Craft 4 |cffffffffGliders|r for an ally, causing them to glide while in the air and reducing their damage taken from falling for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Not usable while in combat.

A Quick Demise.name: A Quick Demise
A Quick Demise.description: Auto shots now have a 20% chance to extend the duration of your Serrated Shot by 2 sec.

Adrenaline Rush.name: Adrenaline Rush
Adrenaline Rush.description:
Surge with vitality, dispeling all harmful effects from yourself and increasing your movement speed by 40% for 10 seconds.

Usable while stealthed.

Aerial Assault.name: Aerial Assault
Aerial Assault.description: Removes the Focus cost of Falcon's Call, allows it to strike 2 additional targets, and increases its range by 10 yds.

Ambuscade.name: Ambuscade
Ambuscade.description: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Flank by 20%, plus an additional 35% if you have a polearm equipped.

An Arrow for Everything.name: An Arrow for Everything
An Arrow for Everything.description: Increases the effectiveness of Quivers by 25%.

Archery Master.name: Archery Master
Archery Master.description: Critical strikes with Quick Shot now generate an additional stack of Advantage.

Assassin.name: Assassin
Assassin.description: Increases the duration of Knockout and Crippling Shot by 1 sec.

Assault.name: Assault
Assault.description:
Assault a low health enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage (175% with a dagger equipped) plus an additional 50 Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, this deals 50% increased damage.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

Banditry.name: Banditry
Banditry.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and Focus regeneration by 15%.

Barbed Quills.name: Barbed Quills
Barbed Quills.description:
Damage dealt by Wild Strike and Quills will now tear into enemies, causing them to bleed for 78 Physical damage over 9 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Damage dealt by Quills now spreads your periodic effects to 5 enemies within 10 yds and extends their duration by 2 sec.

Battle Prowess.name: Battle Prowess
Battle Prowess.description:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Battle Screech.name: Battle Screech
Battle Screech.description:
Empower party and raid members within 40 yds, increasing their attack or spell power by 80 for 15 sec.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Beatdown.name: Beatdown
Beatdown.description:
Level 20 Passive
Auto attacks now have a 5% chance to reveal a fault in the enemy's defenses, causing your next instance of Physical ability damage to ignore Armor.

Chance increased by 15% while wielding a polearm.

Befriend Beast.name: Befriend Beast
Befriend Beast.description: Befriend a beast, taking control of it for 40 sec (8 sec vs players). Only one beast can be befriended at a time.

Blackjack.name: Blackjack
Blackjack.description:
Knock an enemy over the head, sapping them for 40 sec (8 sec vs players).

Can only affect 1 target at a time. Damage dealt will interrupt this effect. Can only be used on Humanoids and Beasts and cannot be used in combat.

Bleeding Edge.name: Bleeding Edge
Bleeding Edge.description:
Level 40 Passive
Allows the periodic damage dealt by Serrated Shot to critically strike.

Bloody Focus.name: Bloody Focus
Bloody Focus.description: Reduces the Focus cost of Toxic Dart by -15.

Blow the Horns!.name: Blow the Horns!
Blow the Horns!.description: Reduces the cooldown of Horn spells by -25%.

Blur.name: Blur
Blur.description: Increases your chance to dodge and parry by 4%.

Boots of Elvenkind.name: Boots of Elvenkind
Boots of Elvenkind.description: Increases your Agility by 5% and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -20%.

Bounty Hunter.name: Bounty Hunter
Bounty Hunter.description: Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25% for 8 seconds.

Briar Veil.name: Briar Veil
Briar Veil.description: Thorns and leaves swirl around you, masking your movements for 10 seconds, increasing your dodge chance by 50% and causing dodging attacks to restore 2% maximum health and 5 Focus.

Brutal Shot.name: Brutal Shot
Brutal Shot.description:
Fire a volley of powerful shots that pierce through Armor, dealing 450% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 300 to all targets in a 40 yd line.

While Skirmish is active this ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

Bushcraft Glider.name: Bushcraft Glider
Bushcraft Glider.description:
Craft a |cffffffffGlider|r for an ally, causing them to glide while in the air and reducing their damage taken from falling for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Not usable while in combat.

Bushwhack.name: Bushwhack
Bushwhack.description: Appear behind your target from the shadows, stunning them for 4 sec.

Camper.name: Camper
Camper.description: Reduces the cast time of your Bushcraft abilities by -50%.

Campsite.name: Campsite
Campsite.description: Construct a |cffffffffCampsite|r and place a |cffffffffCampfire|r nearby for until cancelled. Allies may interact with it to become well rested for 2 |4hour:hrs;.

Close Quarters.name: Close Quarters
Close Quarters.description: Increases your attack power and Agility by 3%.

Command Aura.name: Command Aura
Command Aura.description:
Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 35% ranged AP additional damage as Stormstrike Damage when they deal direct damage.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Coordination.name: Coordination
Coordination.description:
Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now grant you a stack of Coordination when they deal damage.
Coordination (Proc)Increases your critical strike chance and critical damage by 1% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Corrosive Poison.name: Corrosive Poison
Corrosive Poison.description: Your ranged abilities against Poisoned targets now ignores 25% of enemy armor.

Crippling Shot.name: Crippling Shot
Crippling Shot.description: Fire a crippling shot at an enemy slowing movement speed by -50% and knocking them off their mounts, making them unable to mount again for 5 seconds.

Cure Heavy Leather.name: Cure Heavy Leather
Cure Heavy Leather.description: Turn 1 |cFFFFFFFFHeavy Leather|r into 3 |cFFFFFFFFCrude Leather|r that you can use for your Craft abilities.

Cure Light Leather.name: Cure Light Leather
Cure Light Leather.description: Turn 1 |cffffffffLight Leather|r into 1 |cffffffffCrude Leather|r that you can use for your craft abilities.

Cure Medium Leather.name: Cure Medium Leather
Cure Medium Leather.description: Turn 1 |cFFFFFFFFMedium Leather|r into 2 |cFFFFFFFFCrude Leather|r that you can use for your craft abilities.

Cure Rugged Leather.name: Cure Rugged Leather
Cure Rugged Leather.description: Turn 1 |cFFFFFFFFRugged Leather|r into 5 |cFFFFFFFFCrude Leather|r that you can use for your craft abilities.

Cure Thick Leather.name: Cure Thick Leather
Cure Thick Leather.description: Turn 1 |cFFFFFFFFThick Leather|r into 4 |cFFFFFFFFCrude Leather|r that you can use for your Craft abilities.

Cutthroat.name: Cutthroat
Cutthroat.description:
Shoot a powerful arrow that deals Weapon Damage plus 40 and stuns the target for 1 seconds. 

Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.

Dastardly.name: Dastardly
Dastardly.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your critical damage dealt by 15% on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

Deadeye.name: Deadeye
Deadeye.description: Increases the range of your ranged abilities and Auto Shot by 5 yds.

Deadshot.name: Deadshot
Deadshot.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 2 Advantage|r
Shoot a powerful arrow at the target dealing 293% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 32.

Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

Defense of the Ancients.name: Defense of the Ancients
Defense of the Ancients.description:
You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Deft Hands.name: Deft Hands
Deft Hands.description: Increases your melee and ranged haste by 5%.

Devastating Shots.name: Devastating Shots
Devastating Shots.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and your hit chance by 1%.

Dice Games.name: Dice Games
Dice Games.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Wild Strike and Assault by 5%.

Dirty Blades.name: Dirty Blades
Dirty Blades.description:
For 4 seconds, your melee auto attacks deal an additional 30% (doubled with a dagger equipped) of the damage dealt as Nature damage and reduces your target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Duration increased by 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

Usable while in Elude.

Double The Pace.name: Double The Pace
Double The Pace.description:
Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Dragonhawk Tamer.name: Dragonhawk Tamer
Dragonhawk Tamer.description: Using a Horn now summons a Dragonhawk to assist you in combat for 15 seconds.

Dream Flowers.name: Dream Flowers
Dream Flowers.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your damaging critical strikes now spawn a green Dream Flower at a random location within 15 yds of you. Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.Can only occur once per sec.

Dust Toss.name: Dust Toss
Dust Toss.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Throw dust in an enemy's eyes, reducing their chance to hit by 100% and dazing them for 3 sec.

While in combat, you remain stealthed for 2 sec after using |cffffffffDust Toss|r.

Elude.name: Elude
Elude.description:
Allows you to sneak around in stealth. Reducing your movement speed by 20% while stealthed. Lasts until cancelled.

Cannot be used while in combat.

Elusive Character.name: Elusive Character
Elusive Character.description: Increases your damage dealt by 10% for 12 seconds after leaving Elude.

Elven Tactics.name: Elven Tactics
Elven Tactics.description: You now have a -20% chance to not consume Advantage on cast.

Emerald Arrow.name: Emerald Arrow
Emerald Arrow.description:
Set up a powerful magical arrow and then shoot it, dealing 19 Nature damage to the target, increased by 30% for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Creates an enchanted flare on the ground, causing nearby enemies to take 10 Nature damage every 2 sec, lasting 2 sec for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Excessive But Necessary.name: Excessive But Necessary
Excessive But Necessary.description: Reduces the cooldown of Elude and Knockout by -4 sec.

Falcon Charmer.name: Falcon Charmer
Falcon Charmer.description: Increases the duration of War Falcons by 3 sec.

Falcon Diving.name: Falcon Diving
Falcon Diving.description: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now summons a War Falcon to aid you in combat for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 4 sec.

Falcon Guide.name: Falcon Guide
Falcon Guide.description: Falconstrike and Battle Screech now increase your movement speed by 30% for 3 seconds.

Falcon Scout.name: Falcon Scout
Falcon Scout.description:
Summon a falcon and see through its eyes for 1 min, allowing you to see stealthed and invisible enemies and to track humanoids for the duration.

Usable while in |cffffffffElude|r.

Falcon's Aid.name: Falcon's Aid
Falcon's Aid.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to summon a War Falcon to aid you in battle for 6 seconds.

Falcon's Call.name: Falcon's Call
Falcon's Call.description:
Call down war falcons upon a targeted area, slowing up to 8 enemies within the area by -60% for 5 seconds.

A Falcon is summoned for each enemy affected for 12 seconds.

Feral Pressure.name: Feral Pressure
Feral Pressure.description: The current party or raid member targeted will receive the threat caused by your next damaging attack and all actions taken for 4 sec afterwards.

Flank.name: Flank
Flank.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 2 Advantage|r
Flank an enemy from behind, taking them by surprise and dealing 150% Weapon Damage (300% if a dagger is equipped) plus 10 Physical damage.

Focused Fighter.name: Focused Fighter
Focused Fighter.description: Reduces the Focus cost of Flank, Blackjack, and Wild Strike by -10%.

Footpad's Adaptation.name: Footpad's Adaptation
Footpad's Adaptation.description:
Increase the friendly target's armor by 105 and all primary attributes by 4 for 30 min.

@ext:Does not stack with other similar effects.:ext@

Forest Dweller.name: Forest Dweller
Forest Dweller.description: While in Elude, gain 20% increased movement speed and regenerate 3% maximum health every 3 sec.

Forest Fighter.name: Forest Fighter
Forest Fighter.description: Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.

Forest Herald.name: Forest Herald
Forest Herald.description: Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20% chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you.Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.

Forestwood Key.name: Forestwood Key
Forestwood Key.description: Creates a temporary magical grove key to open locks that require up to 25 lockpicking skill.

Freedom.name: Freedom
Freedom.description: Free up to 10 nearby allies within 15 yds of you for 8 seconds, causing them to become immune to roots and snares, and allowing their critical strikes to increase their movement speed by 30% for 5 seconds.

Frenzy.name: Frenzy
Frenzy.description:
Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Grace.name: Grace
Grace.description: Increases your Agility and movement speed by 4%.

Grappling Arrows.name: Grappling Arrows
Grappling Arrows.description: Increases the range of Snatch by 15 yds.

Greater Footpad's Adaptation.name: Greater Footpad's Adaptation
Greater Footpad's Adaptation.description: Increases nearby party and raid member's armor by 285 and all primary attributes by 12 for 30 min.

Greater Woodsman's Adaptation.name: Greater Woodsman's Adaptation
Greater Woodsman's Adaptation.description: Enhance your party and raid members focus, increasing their melee and ranged attack power by 232. Lasts 30 min

Grovewood Key.name: Grovewood Key
Grovewood Key.description: Creates a temporary magical grove key to open locks that require up to 200 lockpicking skill.

Guidance.name: Guidance
Guidance.description: Increases your Physical and Nature damage dealt by 1% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.

Guile of the Cutthroat.name: Guile of the Cutthroat
Guile of the Cutthroat.description:
Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged attack power by 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your damage dealt by 3%.

Guile of the Ranger.name: Guile of the Ranger
Guile of the Ranger.description: Your Instinct now additionally increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Agility.

Guise.name: Guise
Guise.description:
Instantly generates 5 stacks of Advantage and allows you see nearby stealthed enemies for 5 seconds.

Usable while stealthed.

Gutpiercer.name: Gutpiercer
Gutpiercer.description: Damage dealt by War Falcons and Dragonhawks now has a 15% chance to reduce the enemy's resistances by 75 and increase their Magic damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds.

Hawkeye.name: Hawkeye
Hawkeye.description:
You now fire an arrow every 3 sec at enemies within 30 yds affected by your Hunting Shot, dealing 75% Ranged Weapon Damage.

Scales with Hunting Shot modifiers.

Headshots Only.name: Headshots Only
Headshots Only.description: Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10%, stacking 10 times.

Heightened Senses.name: Heightened Senses
Heightened Senses.description: Reduces the Focus cost Adrenaline Rush by -50% and increases the movement speed granted by 20%.

Highlander.name: Highlander
Highlander.description: Each time you spawn a green Dreamflower you are granted 1 stack of Highlander.Highlander (Stacks)At 3 stacks, your next Falconstrike within 10 seconds deals 25% increased damage and reduces the enemy's healing received by -40% for 8 seconds.

Highwayman.name: Highwayman
Highwayman.description: Direct critical strikes while behind your target increase your haste by 15% for 5 seconds, or for your next 2 attacks.

Hookshot.name: Hookshot
Hookshot.description:
Launch a hook at a target attempting to lodge it into an open wound, dealing 119 Physical damage. 

If the target is bleeding, you can reactivate this to pull yourself to them, dealing 150% Weapon Damage and generating 2 |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r

Horn of Alacrity.name: Horn of Alacrity
Horn of Alacrity.description:
Generates 1 Advantage
Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5% increased haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

Horn of Endurance.name: Horn of Endurance
Horn of Endurance.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Emanate an aura for 30 sec that grants allies a 30% chance when they cast a spell or ability to heal themselves for 4.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

@ext:All |cffffffffRanger's Horn|r spells share a cooldown.:ext@

Horn of Perseverance.name: Horn of Perseverance
Horn of Perseverance.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Emanate an aura for 30 sec that reduces the resource costs of spells by 10% for allies within 100 yds.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

@ext:All |cffffffffRanger's Horn|r spells share a cooldown.:ext@

Horn of War.name: Horn of War
Horn of War.description:
Generates 1 Advantage
Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5% increased critical strike chance to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

Hunting Quiver.name: Hunting Quiver

Hunting Shot.name: Hunting Shot
Hunting Shot.description:
Fire a shot that ricochets between 3 enemies, dealing Ranged Weapon Damage plus 10 to each enemy.

Generates 1 stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r for each enemy hit.

Hunting Tactics.name: Hunting Tactics
Hunting Tactics.description: Damage dealt by Skullpiercer is increased by 30% against Poisoned targets.

Hunting with Precision.name: Hunting with Precision
Hunting with Precision.description: Your Hunting Shot now deals 25% increased damage for each subsequent target it ricochets to.

Improved Serrated Shot.name: Improved Serrated Shot
Improved Serrated Shot.description: Increases the damage of Serrated Shot by 30%.

Improved Waterskins.name: Improved Waterskins
Improved Waterskins.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Waterskins by 25%.

Incendiary Shot.name: Incendiary Shot
Incendiary Shot.description:
Shoot a burning arrow dealing 791 + 35% ranged AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage to an enemy and up to 5 enemies within 6 yds, and causing your next 3 direct damage Advantage spenders to deal 50% of their damage to nearby enemies.

Direct damage increased by 20% for each stack of Advantage.

Instinct.name: Instinct
Instinct.description:
Your instinct kicks in, instantly restoring 40 Focus and increasing your attack power by 40% of your Agility for 15 sec.

Usable while stealthed.

Instinctual Combatant.name: Instinctual Combatant
Instinctual Combatant.description:
Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike.

In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10% of your Agility as melee attack power.

Jagged Cuts.name: Jagged Cuts
Jagged Cuts.description: Increases the damage and duration of Toxic Dart and Ravage by 25%.

Knockout.name: Knockout
Knockout.description:
Knock an enemy out, incapacitating them for 4 seconds and removing bleed and poison effects from them. Damage caused will interrupt this effect.

Usable while in Elude.

Knotted Cord.name: Knotted Cord
Knotted Cord.description: Craft a |cffffffffKnotted Cord|r you can give to an ally, increasing their First Aid and Skinning speed by $%.

Knuckleduster.name: Knuckleduster
Knuckleduster.description: Periodic damage dealt now generates 5 Focus.

Lacerations.name: Lacerations
Lacerations.description:
Level 40 Passive
Allows the periodic damage dealt by Ravage to critically strike.

Lethal Cunning.name: Lethal Cunning
Lethal Cunning.description: Entering Elude generates 1 stack of Advantage and 10 Focus every 5 sec for 30 seconds.

Lethal Wounds.name: Lethal Wounds
Lethal Wounds.description: Increases the tick rate of your periodic damage effects by -20%.

Light Arrows.name: Light Arrows
Light Arrows.description: Increases the damage of Precision Shot by 20% when used from 40 yds or further away from your target.

Light Quiver.name: Light Quiver

Marked for Death.name: Marked for Death
Marked for Death.description: While you have daggers equipped, direct critical strikes on enemies below 35% health now have a chance to allow the use of abilities as if you were in Elude for 5 sec.

Masterful Archery.name: Masterful Archery
Masterful Archery.description: While in Elude, gain a stack of Masterful Archery every 2 sec.Masterful Archery (Aura)Your next Precision Shot now deals 10% increased damage for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

Maximum Power.name: Maximum Power
Maximum Power.description: Abilities used with 5 stacks of Advantage now refresh the duration of your active Skirmish by 5 sec.

Mortal Shots.name: Mortal Shots
Mortal Shots.description: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot by -4 sec.

Natural Disguise.name: Natural Disguise
Natural Disguise.description: Instantly dispels all movement slowing effects from allies within 30 yds and transforms them into a bush, stealthing them for 20 seconds.

Neurotoxin Arrow.name: Neurotoxin Arrow
Neurotoxin Arrow.description:
Shoot at an enemy's throat with a toxin-laced arrow, dealing 25 + 36.07% ranged AP Nature damage and silencing them for 1 seconds.

Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.

New-Age Archery.name: New-Age Archery
New-Age Archery.description: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Precision Shot by 20%.

Nimble.name: Nimble
Nimble.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your ranged haste by 20% of your Agility.

No Mercy.name: No Mercy
No Mercy.description: Increases the critical damage of Flank by 10%.

One Shot, One Kill.name: One Shot, One Kill
One Shot, One Kill.description: Increases the damage of Deadshot by 75%.

Onslaught.name: Onslaught
Onslaught.description: Your senses heighten, causing you to instantly generate 5 Advantage and allowing the use of abilities that require Elude for 15 seconds.

Opportunist.name: Opportunist
Opportunist.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Precision Shot by 50% on enemies above 80% health.

Outlaw.name: Outlaw
Outlaw.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Adaptations by 20%.

Outmaneuver.name: Outmaneuver
Outmaneuver.description:
Teleport to an enemy, summon a decoy beneath them, and mark them for 8 seconds. Dealing melee damage to them adds a stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks.

Reactivating this ability within 8 seconds deals 1 + 55% AP Physical damage to your target, increased by 20% for each stack on the target, and then teleports you back to your decoy.

Usable while in Elude.

Pathfinder.name: Pathfinder
Pathfinder.description: Your Adrenaline Rush now incurs a -90% reduced cooldown when used while Elude is active.

Pecking.name: Pecking
Pecking.description: Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now have a 25% chance to deal additional Physical damage to 3 nearby enemies.

Phoenix Plumes.name: Phoenix Plumes
Phoenix Plumes.description: Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.

Pierced.name: Pierced
Pierced.description: Critical strikes with Skullpiercer and Precision Shot cause the enemy to bleed for an additional 50% damage of the damage dealt over 4 seconds.

Pilfering.name: Pilfering
Pilfering.description: Adds 10% to the damage dealt by Dirty Blades and causes its damage dealt to heal you equal to 50% of the value.

Pinpoint Accuracy.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
Pinpoint Accuracy.description: Critical strikes with direct damaging abilities now generate 4 Focus.

Plumes of War.name: Plumes of War
Plumes of War.description:
Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15%.

In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Poison Quiver.name: Poison Quiver

Polearm Craft.name: Polearm Craft
Polearm Craft.description: While a polearm is equipped, your chance to trigger your Weapon Crafts and their damage dealt is increased by 25%.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description:
Precisely shoot an enemy from a great distance, inflicting 48 Physical damage.

Damage increased by 25% for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Usable while in |cffffffffElude|r.

Quel'dorei Poison.name: Quel'dorei Poison
Quel'dorei Poison.description: Damage dealt by Woodland Arrow and Emerald Arrow now poison enemies for 3 seconds, dealing 91 + 10% ranged AP Nature damage every 1 sec.

Quick Shot.name: Quick Shot
Quick Shot.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Shoot an enemy, dealing 90% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 9.

Quick-Witted.name: Quick-Witted
Quick-Witted.description: Avoiding an attack now causes you to quickly stab an enemy with one of the arrows from your quiver, dealing 1 + 100% AP Physical damage and reducing their attack speed by -20% for 8 seconds.

Quills.name: Quills
Quills.description:
Launch darts at up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 39 Ranged Physical damage.

Deals 50% additional damage and strikes 1 additional target for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Ranger's Map.name: Ranger's Map
Ranger's Map.description: Craft a |cFFFFFFFFMap|r you can give to an ally, allowing the reader to locate nearby treasure, making it appear on the minimap. Lasts 30 min.

Rapid Strikes.name: Rapid Strikes
Rapid Strikes.description:
Melee and ranged auto attacks now have a 25% chance to strike an additional time for 50% of the damage dealt.

Can only occur once per sec.

Ravage.name: Ravage
Ravage.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Ravage an enemy, causing them to bleed out dealing 184 Physical damage over 12 sec.

Ravager.name: Ravager
Ravager.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your Wild Strike now generates 1 additional Advantage.

Removes the minimum range of your ranged abilities.

Razorquills.name: Razorquills
Razorquills.description: Increases the tick rate of Toxic Dart and Emerald Arrows by -20%.

Resourceful.name: Resourceful
Resourceful.description: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot and Snapseed by -20%.

Rider's Harness.name: Rider's Harness
Rider's Harness.description: Craft a |cffffffffRider's Harness|r that you can give to an ally, increasing their mounted movement speed by 25% for 30 min.

Rub It In.name: Rub It In
Rub It In.description:
Level 30 Passive
Each stack of Advantage spent now gives you a 20% chance to refund 1 stack of Advantage.

Rusty Shiv.name: Rusty Shiv
Rusty Shiv.description: Stab an enemy with a rusty shiv, accumulating 10% of all damage you deal to them over the next 10 sec and dealing damage at the end of the duration for the total amount.

Scavenger.name: Scavenger
Scavenger.description: Increases the duration of Battle Screech and reduces the cooldown of Snapseed by 5 sec.

Searing Quiver.name: Searing Quiver

Serrated Shot.name: Serrated Shot
Serrated Shot.description:
Fire a serrated arrow at an enemy, causing them to bleed for 39 Physical damage, repeating every 3 sec for 4 sec.

Duration increased by 4 sec per stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Serrations.name: Serrations
Serrations.description: Increases your damage against bleeding or Poisoned targets by 5%.

Sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
Level 50 Passive
Adds 25% to the bonuses that your stacks of Advantage provide.

Silent, But Deadly.name: Silent, But Deadly
Silent, But Deadly.description: Direct Physical damage dealt now has an 8% chance to allow you to use Deadshot regardless of the targets health for 8 seconds.

Skinner's Grip.name: Skinner's Grip
Skinner's Grip.description: Craft a |cFFFFFFFFSkinner's Grip|r you can give to an ally, Increasing their Skinning skill by 10 for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Skirmish.name: Skirmish
Skirmish.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 15% and reduces your Focus costs by -25%.

Lasts 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

Skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
Level 10 Passive
Increases the damage and tick rate of Toxic Dart by -30%, but reduces the duration of its damaging effect by -30%.

Skirmisher's Quiver.name: Skirmisher's Quiver

Skullpiercer.name: Skullpiercer
Skullpiercer.description:
Aim for the skull, dealing 27 Physical damage.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Sly.name: Sly
Sly.description: Your Woodland Adept now triggers a -10% reduced cooldown for each stack of Advantage active when cast.

Snapseed.name: Snapseed
Snapseed.description: Toss a snapseed at an enemy, dealing 61 Physical damage and knocking them back.

Snatch.name: Snatch
Snatch.description:
Snatch an enemy's melee weapons, disarming them for 4 seconds.

If you are disarmed, you also return your weapon to yourself.

Sniper's Focus.name: Sniper's Focus
Sniper's Focus.description: Consuming Advantage now has a 20% chance per Archery Point spent to refund 20 Focus.

Stalker.name: Stalker
Stalker.description: Reduces the cooldown of Cutthroat by -15 sec, but reduces the range of Cutthroat by -10 yds.

Stonemason's Secret.name: Stonemason's Secret
Stonemason's Secret.description: Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.

Strike Where It Hurts.name: Strike Where It Hurts
Strike Where It Hurts.description: Your ability critical strikes now increase the damage the target takes from bleeds by 30% for 15 seconds.

Studded Arrows.name: Studded Arrows
Studded Arrows.description: Increases the ranged weapon damage dealt by Quick Shot by 10%.

Superb Shot.name: Superb Shot
Superb Shot.description: Damage dealt by Auto Shot now restores 4 Focus.

Surefooted.name: Surefooted
Surefooted.description: Reduces the cooldown of Adrenaline Rush by -30 sec.

Survival Expert.name: Survival Expert
Survival Expert.description: Increases the dodge chance provided by Briar Veil by 25%.

Survival Kit.name: Survival Kit
Survival Kit.description: Your Survival Potion now also heals you for 10% of your maximum health with each tick.

Survival Potion.name: Survival Potion
Survival Potion.description: Drink a survival potion, dispelling all poison and disease effects and removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

Survivalist.name: Survivalist
Survivalist.description: Reduces the cooldown of Survival Potion by -25%.

Swiftshot.name: Swiftshot
Swiftshot.description: Damage dealt by Precision Shot now increases enemy Physical damage taken by 4% for 10 seconds.

Thalassian Brand.name: Thalassian Brand
Thalassian Brand.description:
Mark an enemy for total destruction, increasing your allies ranged attack power against the target by 300 and dealing 1120 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 seconds.

The marked target can always be seen by the Ranger whether it stealths or turns invisible

Thread The Needle.name: Thread The Needle
Thread The Needle.description: Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Throatpunch.name: Throatpunch
Throatpunch.description: Punch an enemy in the throat, interrupting the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 2 seconds.

Tip of the Spear.name: Tip of the Spear
Tip of the Spear.description: While you have a polearm equipped, your Wild Strike now has a 15% chance to strike 3 additional times.

To The Skies!.name: To The Skies!
To The Skies!.description: Reduces the cooldown of Bushcraft Glider by -30 sec.

Toxic Dart.name: Toxic Dart

Trueshot Lodge Training.name: Trueshot Lodge Training
Trueshot Lodge Training.description:
Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.

While wielding a polearm, your Physical damage dealt is increased by 3%.

Twineweave Line.name: Twineweave Line
Twineweave Line.description: Craft a |cffffffffTwineweave Line|r you can give to an ally, increasing their skill in Fishing by 10 for 1 |4hour:hrs;.

Uncover Weakness.name: Uncover Weakness
Uncover Weakness.description:
Launch a heavy blunt arrow at an enemy that reduces their armor by 25% for 5 sec.

Duration increased by 5 sec per stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Underhanded.name: Underhanded
Underhanded.description: Increases the attack power scaling of Skullpiercer by 15%.

Venom-Coated Seeds.name: Venom-Coated Seeds
Venom-Coated Seeds.description: Damage dealt by Snapseed now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -15% for 10 seconds.

Viper's Bite.name: Viper's Bite
Viper's Bite.description:
Generates 2 Advantage
Unleash 4 quick strikes over 1 seconds to an enemy, each dealing 85% Weapon Damage.

If the target is bleeding, each strike deals an additional 400 + 25% AP Physical damage.

If the target is poisoned, each strike deals Nature damage instead of Physical damage.

War Falconer.name: War Falconer
War Falconer.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Falcon's Call by -30 sec.

Weapon Craft: Burning Toxin.name: Weapon Craft: Burning Toxin
Weapon Craft: Burning Toxin.description: Coat your weapon in a burning toxin, giving auto attacks a 30% chance to deal 14 Fire damage.

Weapon Craft: Freezing Toxin.name: Weapon Craft: Freezing Toxin
Weapon Craft: Freezing Toxin.description: Coat your weapon in a freezing toxin, giving auto attacks a 30% chance to reduce the target's movement speed and attack speed by 20% for 6 sec.

Weapon Craft: Jagged Edge.name: Weapon Craft: Jagged Edge
Weapon Craft: Jagged Edge.description: Line your melee weapon with jagged edges, giving auto attacks a 30% chance to increase the damage the target takes from bleeds by 30% for 10 sec.

Weapon Craft: Nerve Venom.name: Weapon Craft: Nerve Venom
Weapon Craft: Nerve Venom.description: Coat your weapon in nerve venom, giving auto attacks a 30% chance to deal 4 Nature damage and reduce your target's casting speed by 30% for 6 sec.

Weapon Craft: Oil Dip.name: Weapon Craft: Oil Dip
Weapon Craft: Oil Dip.description: Coat your weapon in oil for until cancelled, giving auto attacks a 30% chance to increase the Fire damage your target takes from you by 50% for 10 sec.

Whats Yours Is Mine.name: Whats Yours Is Mine
Whats Yours Is Mine.description: Removes the Focus cost of Snatch.

Whipvine Arrow.name: Whipvine Arrow
Whipvine Arrow.description:
Launch an arrow with magical vines attached to it at your target, dealing 78 + 33% ranged AP Nature damage and rooting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

Hits 1 additional nearby target per stack of Advantage.

Wild Blessing.name: Wild Blessing
Wild Blessing.description:
Increases the Nature Resistance of all party and raid members by 45 for 30 min.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Wild Man.name: Wild Man
Wild Man.description: Your Wild Strike now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies, but deals reduced damage with each enemy struck.

Wild Strike.name: Wild Strike
Wild Strike.description:
|cff8fff7aGenerates 1 Advantage|r
Strike an enemy wildly for 100% Weapon Damage plus 12.

If dual wielding, deals additional Weapon Damage with your off-hand weapon.

Wildwood Key.name: Wildwood Key
Wildwood Key.description: Creates a temporary magical grove key to open locks that require up to 125 lockpicking skill.

Windrunner's Reach.name: Windrunner's Reach
Windrunner's Reach.description:
Increases the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds.

In addition, your critical strike chance against Undead, Beasts, and Dragonkin is increased by 2%.

Wingman.name: Wingman
Wingman.description: Reduces all damage taken by -2% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.

Woodland Adept.name: Woodland Adept
Woodland Adept.description: Slip into the shadows, entering an improved stealth mode, increases your movement speed by 25% for 10 seconds, and applies Elude.

Woodland Arrow.name: Woodland Arrow
Woodland Arrow.description:
Shoot a magical arrow, dealing 60 Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of active |cFFFFFFFFHorn|r spells by 15 sec.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of |cff8fff7aAdvantage|r.

Woodland Stalker.name: Woodland Stalker
Woodland Stalker.description: While in Elude, your critical strike chance is now increased by 20%.

Woodsman's Adaptation.name: Woodsman's Adaptation
Woodsman's Adaptation.description: Enhance an ally's focus, increasing their melee and ranged attack power by 30. Lasts 30 min
